guards: --apply-safe-prune must only mutate targets already present in cleanup_targets with safe_to_prune=true.
--apply requires the exact proposal id and expected Planning revision returned by preview.
--apply-issue-relation-reconcile requires the current relation revision for semantic edits.
--apply-issue-relation-migration preserves membership, priority, dependencies, rationale, and maturity before demoting duplicate legacy fields.

inputs.description: When true, remove only cleanup targets already marked safe_to_prune by reconcile.
inputs.name: apply_safe_prune

inputs.description: Preview safe-prune application without writing repo state.
inputs.name: dry_run

inputs.description: Compile and persist a reusable reconciliation proposal without mutating Planning state.
inputs.name: preview

inputs.description: Apply a previously previewed reconciliation proposal.
inputs.name: apply

inputs.description: Exact proposal identity returned by the reconciliation preview.
inputs.name: proposal

inputs.description: Compare-and-swap Planning revision required when applying a proposal.
inputs.name: expected_planning_revision

steps.description: Emit reconcile in the requested format.

ir_plan.summary: Load planning reconcile payload and emit text or JSON through the generated operation executor.

proof: safe-prune tests cover exact roadmap/decomposition cleanup and dry-run behavior
proposal/apply tests cover revision guards, idempotence, and transaction rollback
issue-relation tests cover supported conflict repair and legacy authority migration

steps.description: When requested, remove exact cleanup targets already marked safe_to_prune and then reload verification state.
Emit report in the requested format.

summary: Report planning reconciliation state and optionally apply exact safe-to-prune cleanup targets.

writes.when: a preview records a reusable proposal or apply records its idempotence receipt
--apply-issue-relation-reconcile updates one semantic relation or --apply-issue-relation-migration migrates legacy strategic fields
--apply-issue-relation-migration demotes duplicate legacy strategic authority to derived references
